name: tokenade
install_doc: Faithful replica of what `tokenade install` writes by DEFAULT on Claude Code (2026-06 zero-MCP pivot): hooks only, no MCP server. Includes SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreCompact passive hooks, PostToolUse Bash `hookwrap` output compaction, PostToolUse Read `hookwrap-postread`, the PreToolUse Bash-rewrite (`hookwrap-pretool`, matcher `Bash`) that rewrites each eligible `Bash(cmd)` to `Bash(tokenade wrap '<cmd>')` via the safe allow+updatedInput channel, and the v12 CLI-exploration CLAUDE.md scaffold. The Grep/Glob deny-redirect was removed (no opt-in: PreToolUse `deny` is the only substitution channel for those tools and Claude Code wraps the reason in <error>, reading a success as a failure). Captured against a live 0.5.6 install.
claude_md:
# Project rules for AI coding agents

Auto-scaffolded by tokenade. Safe to edit; the tokenade block below is identified by the HTML marker and will be updated in-place on future tokenade upgrades.

## Explore code with the `tokenade` CLI (cheaper than reading whole files)
`tokenade map` (repo structure) · `tokenade skeleton <file>` (signatures only) · `tokenade query <symbol>` (locate a symbol) · `tokenade semantic "<query>"` (search by meaning). Pipe big output through `tokenade auto`.
